prompt: Create a cinematic cyberpunk night street scene titled by mood rather than text: an original young market visitor stands in the left foreground with their back and partial profile to the camera, holding a large transparent dome umbrella beaded with rain. The character has short wet black hair and wears a glossy dark hooded raincoat with subtle patterned trim and a crossbody bag, their face mostly in shadow and not resembling any real person. They look toward a glowing rain market on the right: exactly 1 long plastic-tarp produce stall runs diagonally from mid-right to the upper-right corner, with crates of red tomatoes and mixed vegetables, white storage boxes, clear hanging plastic sheets, metal poles, and exactly 7 visible warm amber hanging bulbs under the canopy. The setting is a dense urban market street in heavy rain, with wet pavement reflecting teal and amber neon, blurred pedestrians with umbrellas in the background, vertical out-of-focus East Asian-style shop signs, and deep atmospheric haze. Use a teal and amber neon palette, strong filmic contrast, realistic rain streaks, water droplets on the umbrella and tarp, shallow depth of field, bokeh lights, 35mm street-photography composition, no logos, no readable brand names, no celebrity likeness, no extra foreground objects. The overall mood should feel like quiet solitude in a glass rain market.
